release: Phoenix Platform 4.0.0 - Multi-Tenant Platform Foundation Release 1
scope: Governed organizations, memberships, authenticated tenant context, repository-enforced isolation, idempotent creation, audit events, and initial platform APIs
release_boundaries: No cloud provider or domain is selected by this release
No staging deployment is claimed until an operator deploys the verified immutable image behind HTTPS
No external assurance record is changed to passed by infrastructure templates alone
